"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\NN_Qt_GUI.dir/objects.a
C:\Dev-Cpp\x86_64-15.1.0-release-posix-seh-ucrt-rt_v12-rev0\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\NN_Qt_GUI.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\NN_Qt_GUI.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Dev-Cpp\x86_64-15.1.0-release-posix-seh-ucrt-rt_v12-rev0\mingw64\bin\c++.exe  -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O3 -flto -march=native -g -g -O0  -flto -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\NN_Qt_GUI.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o NN_Qt_GUI.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libNN_Qt_GUI.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\NN_Qt_GUI.dir\linkLibs.rsp
